description: Apply data validation rules to the project tracker spreadsheet at /home/ga/Documents/project_tracker.xlsx. Configure the following validation rules: add a dropdown list for the Status column (E) allowing only 'Not Started', 'In Progress', 'On Hold', 'Completed', and 'Cancelled'; add a dropdown list for the Priority column (F) allowing only 'Low', 'Medium', and 'High'; add a whole number validation to the Budget column (D) requiring values between 1000 and 50000; and add a date validation to the Start Date column (B) requiring dates after 01/01/2015. Apply these validations to all data rows (row 2 onwards). Save the changes to the file.

metadata.data_source: Realistic project tracker data from Kaggle Superstore dataset
